note: term_reference_tree ships a field widget (plugin id `term_reference_tree`) and a matching field formatter (id `term_reference_tree`) for entity_reference (taxonomy term reference) fields. The widget renders a hierarchical expand/collapse checkbox tree via a custom `checkbox_tree` render element. There is no global settings form — configuration lives on each field's entity_form_display component (`field.widget.settings.term_reference_tree`). Recipe cases are response-graded. Medium cases install a known term-reference field whose form display uses the widget with distinctive settings and require live introspection. Hard cases build live config: switch a term-reference field's form-display widget to term_reference_tree with a specific setting, verified against real entity_form_display state.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I have a hierarchical taxonomy and I want editors to pick terms from an expand/collapse checkbox tree that shows the parent-child structure, instead of core's flat checkboxes. Which contrib module provides this, what is the exact field-widget plugin id I select on Manage form display, and which field type(s) can it be applied to?
evals.expected_output: The Term Reference Tree module. Its widget plugin id is `term_reference_tree` (label "Term reference tree"), and it applies to entity_reference fields (taxonomy term reference fields, target_type taxonomy_term). It declares multiple_values = TRUE, so one tree holds all values (radio buttons when cardinality is 1).

evals.prompt: For the Drupal term_reference_tree field widget, which per-field settings control (a) whether the tree starts collapsed, (b) whether only leaf terms are selectable, (c) how a parent checkbox cascades to its children, and (d) how many levels deep the tree shows? Give the setting keys, their default values, and the meaning of the cascading option's values.
evals.expected_output: start_minimized (default true, collapse tree by default), leaves_only (default false, only terms without children selectable), cascading_selection (default 0; 0 none, 1 select+deselect, 2 only-select, 3 only-deselect; unlimited-cardinality only), and max_depth (default 0 = unlimited). Also select_parents and select_all (both default false, unlimited-cardinality only). Stored under the form-display component settings, schema field.widget.settings.term_reference_tree.

evals.prompt: Where do I configure the term_reference_tree widget in Drupal — is there a dedicated admin settings page for the module, does it define any Drush commands or permissions, and does it also provide a way to DISPLAY the selected terms as a tree?
evals.expected_output: There is no global admin settings form (configure is null) and no Drush commands or module-specific permissions. You configure the widget per field on Structure > Content types > Manage form display (stored on the field's entity_form_display component). It also ships a field formatter (id term_reference_tree, no settings) you select on Manage display to render the stored terms as a nested tree.

evals.prompt: A taxonomy term reference field has been added to the Article content type on this site and its edit-form widget was customized. Inspect the Article node form-display configuration and tell me: which field widget is configured for that field, and what are its leaves_only, cascading_selection, and max_depth settings?
evals.expected_output: The field node.article.field_trt_intro uses the `term_reference_tree` widget on the default form display, with settings leaves_only = true, cascading_selection = 2 (only-select), and max_depth = 2 (start_minimized is false).

evals.prompt: This site has an Article field (field_trt_intro) whose node-form widget is the Term reference tree. Inspect the live configuration and tell me what underlying FIELD TYPE that field is and what entity type it references — i.e. what kind of field the term_reference_tree widget is being used on here.
evals.expected_output: field_trt_intro is an entity_reference field targeting taxonomy_term (a taxonomy term reference), multi-value (cardinality -1); the term_reference_tree widget only applies to entity_reference fields.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site, configure the Article content type's default node edit form so the taxonomy term reference field field_eval_trt uses the Term reference tree widget (plugin id term_reference_tree) instead of its current core widget, and set cascading selection to select + deselect (cascading_selection = 1) so toggling a parent cascades to its children. Apply it live so the entity_form_display reflects the change.
evals.expected_output: The node.article.default entity_form_display component for field_eval_trt has type = term_reference_tree with settings.cascading_selection = 1.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site, set the Article node edit form's widget for the taxonomy term reference field field_eval_trt2 to the term_reference_tree widget, and configure it so only leaf terms are selectable (leaves_only = true) and the tree starts collapsed (start_minimized = true). Save it to the live entity_form_display.
evals.expected_output: The node.article.default entity_form_display component for field_eval_trt2 has type = term_reference_tree with settings.leaves_only = true and settings.start_minimized = true.
